title: Bridge Essay: Slow Frequency Anuloma Viloma Pranayama Modulates Cardiac and Neural Oscillation

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Breath and soul — pranayama, breath-brain coupling, respiratory-brain interaction, cardiorespiratory entrainment, vagal pathways of consciousness.

**Slow Frequency Anuloma Viloma Pranayama Modulates Cardiac and Neural Oscillations in Yoga Practitioners.** — Mymensingh Med J. PMID: 35780374. DOI:. Anuloma viloma pranayama (AVP) also known as Alternate nostril breathing (ANB) is the most commonly used form of pranayama, the ancient breath control practice. It is known to modulate cardiovascular control and brain activity. This study analysed the simultaneous recording of Heart rate variability (HRV) and brain activity during and after AVP at avery slow frequency.
